Need help reading this?

ePub

Creates a new Book

ePub(url: (string | ArrayBuffer), options: object): Book
Parameters
url ((string | ArrayBuffer)) URL, Path or ArrayBuffer
options (object) to pass to the book
Returns
Book: a new Book object
Example
ePub("/path/to/book.epub", {})

Book

An Epub representation with methods for the loading, parsing and manipulation of its contents.

new Book(url: string?, options: object?): Book
Parameters
url (string?)
options (object?)
Name Description
options.requestMethod method? a request function to use instead of the default
options.requestCredentials boolean (default undefined) send the xhr request withCredentials
options.requestHeaders object (default undefined) send the xhr request headers
options.encoding string (default binary) optional to pass 'binary' or base64' for archived Epubs
options.replacements string (default none) use base64, blobUrl, or none for replacing assets in archived Epubs
options.canonical method? optional function to determine canonical urls for a path
options.openAs string? optional string to determine the input type
Returns
Book:
Example
new Book("/path/to/book.epub", {})
new Book({ replacements: "blobUrl" })
Static Members
▸ opened
opened
▸ spine
spine

Type: Spine

▸ locations
locations

Type: Locations

▸ navigation
navigation

Type: Navigation

▸ pagelist
pagelist

Type: PageList

Instance Members
▸ open(input, what)

Open a epub or url

open(input: (string | ArrayBuffer), what: string): Promise
Parameters
input ((string | ArrayBuffer)) Url, Path or ArrayBuffer
what (string = "binary","base64","epub","opf","json","directory") force opening as a certain type
Returns
Promise: of when the book has been loaded
Example
book.open("/path/to/book.epub")
▸ load(path)

Load a resource from the Book

load(path: string): Promise
Parameters
path (string) path to the resource to load
Returns
Promise: returns a promise with the requested resource
▸ resolve(path, absolute?)

Resolve a path to it's absolute position in the Book

resolve(path: string, absolute: boolean?): string
Parameters
path (string)
absolute (boolean?) force resolving the full URL
Returns
string: the resolved path string
▸ canonical(path)

Get a canonical link to a path

canonical(path: string): string
Parameters
path (string)
Returns
string: the canonical path string
▸ section(target)

Gets a Section of the Book from the Spine Alias for book.spine.get

section(target: string): Section
Parameters
target (string)
Returns
Section:
▸ renderTo(element, options?)

Sugar to render a book to an element

renderTo(element: (element | string), options: object?): Rendition
Parameters
element ((element | string)) element or string to add a rendition to
options (object?)
Returns
Rendition:
▸ setRequestCredentials(credentials)

Set if request should use withCredentials

setRequestCredentials(credentials: boolean)
Parameters
credentials (boolean)
▸ setRequestHeaders(headers)

Set headers request should use

setRequestHeaders(headers: object)
Parameters
headers (object)
▸ coverUrl()

Get the cover url

coverUrl(): string
Returns
string: coverUrl
▸ getRange(cfiRange)

Find a DOM Range for a given CFI Range

getRange(cfiRange: EpubCFI): Range
Parameters
cfiRange (EpubCFI) a epub cfi range
Returns
Range:
▸ key(identifier?)

Generates the Book Key using the identifer in the manifest or other string provided

key(identifier: string?): string
Parameters
identifier (string?) to use instead of metadata identifier
Returns
string: key
▸ destroy()

Destroy the Book and all associated objects

destroy()

Url

creates a Url object for parsing and manipulation of a url string

new Url(urlString: string, baseString: string?)
Parameters
urlString (string) a url string (relative or absolute)
baseString (string?) optional base for the url, default to window.location.href
Instance Members
▸ path()
path(): Path
Returns
Path:
▸ resolve(what)

Resolves a relative path to a absolute url

resolve(what: string): string
Parameters
what (string)
Returns
string: url
▸ relative(what)

Resolve a path relative to the url

relative(what: string): string
Parameters
what (string)
Returns
string: path
▸ toString()
toString(): string
Returns
string:

Path

Creates a Path object for parsing and manipulation of a path strings

Uses a polyfill for Nodejs path: https://nodejs.org/api/path.html

new Path(pathString: string)
Parameters
pathString (string) a url string (relative or absolute)
Instance Members
▸ parse(what)

Parse the path: https://nodejs.org/api/path.html#path_path_parse_path

parse(what: string): object
Parameters
what (string)
Returns
object:
▸ isAbsolute(what)
isAbsolute(what: string): boolean
Parameters
what (string)
Returns
boolean:
▸ isDirectory(what)

Check if path ends with a directory

isDirectory(what: string): boolean
Parameters
what (string)
Returns
boolean:
▸ resolve(what)

Resolve a path against the directory of the Path

https://nodejs.org/api/path.html#path_path_resolve_paths

resolve(what: string): string
Parameters
what (string)
Returns
string: resolved
▸ relative(what)

Resolve a path relative to the directory of the Path

https://nodejs.org/api/path.html#path_path_relative_from_to

relative(what: string): string
Parameters
what (string)
Returns
string: relative
▸ toString()

Return the path string

toString(): string
Returns
string: path

Spine

A collection of Spine Items

new Spine()
Instance Members
▸ unpack(_package, resolver, canonical)

Unpack items from a opf into spine items

unpack(_package: Packaging, resolver: method, canonical: method)
Parameters
_package (Packaging)
resolver (method) URL resolver
canonical (method) Resolve canonical url
▸ get(target?)

Get an item from the spine

get(target: (string | number)?): Section
Parameters
target ((string | number)?)
Returns
Section: section
Example
spine.get();
spine.get(1);
spine.get("chap1.html");
spine.get("#id1234");
▸ each()

Loop over the Sections in the Spine

each(): method
Returns
method: forEach
▸ first()

Find the first Section in the Spine

first(): Section
Returns
Section: first section
▸ last()

Find the last Section in the Spine

last(): Section
Returns
Section: last section

Section

Represents a Section of the Book

In most books this is equivelent to a Chapter

new Section(item: object, hooks: object)
Parameters
item (object) The spine item representing the section
hooks (object) hooks for serialize and content
Instance Members
▸ load(_request?)

Load the section from its url

load(_request: method?): document
Parameters
_request (method?) a request method to use for loading
Returns
document: a promise with the xml document
▸ render(_request?)

Render the contents of a section

render(_request: method?): string
Parameters
_request (method?) a request method to use for loading
Returns
string: output a serialized XML Document
▸ find(_query)

Find a string in a section

find(_query: string): Array<object>
Parameters
_query (string) The query string to find
Returns
Array<object>: A list of matches, with form {cfi, excerpt}
▸ reconcileLayoutSettings(globalLayout)

Reconciles the current chapters layout properies with the global layout properities.

reconcileLayoutSettings(globalLayout: object): object
Parameters
globalLayout (object) The global layout settings object, chapter properties string
Returns
object: layoutProperties Object with layout properties
▸ cfiFromRange(_range)

Get a CFI from a Range in the Section

cfiFromRange(_range: range): string
Parameters
_range (range)
Returns
string: cfi an EpubCFI string
▸ cfiFromElement(el)

Get a CFI from an Element in the Section

cfiFromElement(el: element): string
Parameters
el (element)
Returns
string: cfi an EpubCFI string
▸ unload()

Unload the section document

unload()

Locations

Find Locations for a Book

new Locations(spine: Spine, request: request, pause: number)
Parameters
spine (Spine)
request (request)
pause (number = 100)
Instance Members
▸ generate(chars)

Load all of sections in the book to generate locations

generate(chars: int): object
Parameters
chars (int) how many chars to split on
Returns
object: locations
▸ locationFromCfi(cfi)

Get a location from an EpubCFI

locationFromCfi(cfi: EpubCFI): number
Parameters
cfi (EpubCFI)
Returns
number:
▸ percentageFromCfi(cfi)

Get a percentage position in locations from an EpubCFI

percentageFromCfi(cfi: EpubCFI): number
Parameters
cfi (EpubCFI)
Returns
number:
▸ percentageFromLocation(loc, location)

Get a percentage position from a location index

percentageFromLocation(loc: any, location: number): number
Parameters
loc (any)
location (number)
Returns
number:
▸ cfiFromLocation(loc)

Get an EpubCFI from location index

cfiFromLocation(loc: number): EpubCFI
Parameters
loc (number)
Returns
EpubCFI: cfi
▸ cfiFromPercentage(percentage)

Get an EpubCFI from location percentage

cfiFromPercentage(percentage: number): EpubCFI
Parameters
percentage (number)
Returns
EpubCFI: cfi
▸ load(locations)

Load locations from JSON

load(locations: json)
Parameters
locations (json)
▸ save()

Save locations to JSON

save(): json
Returns
json:
▸ currentLocation

Get the current location

currentLocation
▸ currentLocation

Set the current location

currentLocation
Parameters
curr (any)
▸ length()

Locations length

length()

Container

Handles Parsing and Accessing an Epub Container

new Container(containerDocument: document?)
Parameters
containerDocument (document?) xml document
Instance Members
▸ parse(containerDocument)

Parse the Container XML

parse(containerDocument: document)
Parameters
containerDocument (document)

Packaging

Open Packaging Format Parser

new Packaging(packageDocument: document)
Parameters
packageDocument (document) OPF XML
Instance Members
▸ parse(packageDocument)

Parse OPF XML

parse(packageDocument: document): object
Parameters
packageDocument (document) OPF XML
Returns
object: parsed package parts
▸ load(json, packageDocument)

Load JSON Manifest

load(json: any, packageDocument: document): object
Parameters
json (any)
packageDocument (document) OPF XML
Returns
object: parsed package parts

Navigation

Navigation Parser

new Navigation(xml: document)
Parameters
xml (document) navigation html / xhtml / ncx
Instance Members
▸ parse(xml)

Parse out the navigation items

parse(xml: document)
Parameters
xml (document) navigation html / xhtml / ncx
▸ get(target)

Get an item from the navigation

get(target: string): object
Parameters
target (string)
Returns
object: navItem
▸ landmark(type)

Get a landmark by type List of types: https://idpf.github.io/epub-vocabs/structure/

landmark(type: string): object
Parameters
type (string)
Returns
object: landmarkItem
▸ load(json)

Load Spine Items

load(json: object): Array
Parameters
json (object) the items to be loaded
Returns
Array: navItems
▸ forEach(fn)

forEach pass through

forEach(fn: Function): method
Parameters
fn (Function) function to run on each item
Returns
method: forEach loop

Resources

Handle Package Resources

new Resources(manifest: Manifest, options: object?)
Parameters
manifest (Manifest)
options (object?)
Name Description
options.replacements string (default "base64")
options.archive Archive?
options.resolver method?
Instance Members
▸ createUrl(url)

Create a url to a resource

createUrl(url: string): Promise<string>
Parameters
url (string)
Returns
Promise<string>: Promise resolves with url string
▸ replacements()

Create blob urls for all the assets

replacements(): Promise
Returns
Promise: returns replacement urls
▸ relativeTo(absolute, resolver?)

Resolve all resources URLs relative to an absolute URL

relativeTo(absolute: string, resolver: resolver?): Array<string>
Parameters
absolute (string) to be resolved to
resolver (resolver?)
Returns
Array<string>: array with relative Urls
▸ get(path)

Get a URL for a resource

get(path: string): string
Parameters
path (string)
Returns
string: url
▸ substitute(content, url?)

Substitute urls in content, with replacements, relative to a url if provided

substitute(content: string, url: string?): string
Parameters
content (string)
url (string?) url to resolve to
Returns
string: content with urls substituted

PageList

Page List Parser

new PageList(xml: document?)
Parameters
xml (document?)
Instance Members
▸ parse(xml)

Parse PageList Xml

parse(xml: document)
Parameters
xml (document)
▸ pageFromCfi(cfi)

Get a PageList result from a EpubCFI

pageFromCfi(cfi: string): number
Parameters
cfi (string) EpubCFI String
Returns
number: page
▸ cfiFromPage(pg)

Get an EpubCFI from a Page List Item

cfiFromPage(pg: (string | number)): string
Parameters
pg ((string | number))
Returns
string: cfi
▸ pageFromPercentage(percent)

Get a Page from Book percentage

pageFromPercentage(percent: number): number
Parameters
percent (number)
Returns
number: page
▸ percentageFromPage(pg)

Returns a value between 0 - 1 corresponding to the location of a page

percentageFromPage(pg: number): number
Parameters
pg (number) the page
Returns
number: percentage
▸ percentageFromCfi(cfi)

Returns a value between 0 - 1 corresponding to the location of a cfi

percentageFromCfi(cfi: string): number
Parameters
cfi (string) EpubCFI String
Returns
number: percentage
▸ destroy()

Destroy

destroy()

Archive

Handles Unzipping a requesting files from an Epub Archive

new Archive()
Instance Members
▸ open(input, isBase64?)

Open an archive

open(input: binary, isBase64: boolean?): Promise
Parameters
input (binary)
isBase64 (boolean?) tells JSZip if the input data is base64 encoded
Returns
Promise: zipfile
▸ openUrl(zipUrl, isBase64?)

Load and Open an archive

openUrl(zipUrl: string, isBase64: boolean?): Promise
Parameters
zipUrl (string)
isBase64 (boolean?) tells JSZip if the input data is base64 encoded
Returns
Promise: zipfile
▸ request(url, type?)

Request a url from the archive

request(url: string, type: string?): Promise<(Blob | string | JSON | Document | XMLDocument)>
Parameters
url (string) a url to request from the archive
type (string?) specify the type of the returned result
Returns
Promise<(Blob | string | JSON | Document | XMLDocument)>:
▸ getBlob(url, mimeType?)

Get a Blob from Archive by Url

getBlob(url: string, mimeType: string?): Blob
Parameters
url (string)
mimeType (string?)
Returns
Blob:
▸ getText(url, encoding?)

Get Text from Archive by Url

getText(url: string, encoding: string?): string
Parameters
url (string)
encoding (string?)
Returns
string:
▸ getBase64(url, mimeType?)

Get a base64 encoded result from Archive by Url

getBase64(url: string, mimeType: string?): string
Parameters
url (string)
mimeType (string?)
Returns
string: base64 encoded
▸ createUrl(url, options)

Create a Url from an unarchived item

createUrl(url: string, options: any): Promise
Parameters
url (string)
options (any)
Returns
Promise: url promise with Url string
▸ revokeUrl(url)

Revoke Temp Url for a achive item

revokeUrl(url: string)
Parameters
url (string) url of the item in the archive

Rendition

Displays an Epub as a series of Views for each Section. Requires Manager and View class to handle specifics of rendering the section contetn.

new Rendition(book: Book, options: object?)
Parameters
book (Book)
options (object?)
Name Description
options.width number?
options.height number?
options.ignoreClass string? class for the cfi parser to ignore
options.manager (string | function | object) (default 'default')
options.view (string | function) (default 'iframe')
options.layout string? layout to force
options.spread string? force spread value
options.minSpreadWidth number? overridden by spread: none (never) / both (always)
options.stylesheet string? url of stylesheet to be injected
options.resizeOnOrientationChange boolean? false to disable orientation events
options.script string? url of script to be injected
Static Members
▸ hooks

Adds Hook methods to the Rendition prototype

hooks

Type: object

▸ themes
themes

Type: Themes

▸ annotations
annotations

Type: Annotations
